name: Sim
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Sim (Gustavus Simmons, 1969): the Ramsey graph game on K6 (6 dots, all 15 edges). Players take turns coloring one uncolored edge in their own colour. A misere/avoidance game: the first player FORCED to complete a triangle of their own colour LOSES. By Ramsey's theorem (R(3,3)=6) the game can never end in a draw.
